title: Plettenberg Bay youth light up the stage at ASAP showcase 2025
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS -  The After School Activities Program (ASAP) Showcase 2025 is a vibrant community event presented by Lunchbox Theatre, celebrating youth talent and creativity through dance and drama.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The After School Activities Program (ASAP) Showcase 2025 is a vibrant community event presented by Lunchbox Theatre, celebrating youth talent and creativity through dance and drama."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The showcase is the culmination of the After School Activities Program (ASAP), which provides arts education and job opportunities for township youth in Knysna and Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Held at Kwanokuthula Primary School, Plettenberg Bay, on 27 November from 18:30 – 20:30, the event brings together families, tourists, and community members to experience inspiring performances that highlight local culture and storytelling. Tickets are R20 for adults and R10 for kids.","html":"Held at Kwanokuthula Primary School, Plettenberg Bay, on 27 November from 18:30 – 20:30, the event brings together families, tourists, and community members to experience inspiring performances that highlight local culture and storytelling. Tickets are R20 for adults and R10 for kids."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Come and support the next generation of young artists and be part of a growing movement that’s transforming lives through the power of theatre.","html":"Come and support the next generation of young artists and be part of a growing movement that’s transforming lives through the power of theatre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lunchbox Theatre is a registered NPO using the power of the performing arts to uplift, empower, educate and entertain. www.lunchbox.org.za","html":"Lunchbox Theatre is a registered NPO using the power of the performing arts to uplift, empower, educate and entertain. www.lunchbox.org.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This event is made possible with the generous support of WESGRO, The Rolf Stefan Nussbaum Foundation, Sustaining Theatre and Dance Foundation and ASSITEJ South Africa.","html":"This event is made possible with the generous support of WESGRO, The Rolf Stefan Nussbaum Foundation, Sustaining Theatre and Dance Foundation and ASSITEJ South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more info please email [email protected] or call Amanda Valela-Ntantiso on 0834790069","html":"For more info please email [email protected] or call Amanda Valela-Ntantiso on 0834790069"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
